summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Slippage Engine PHASE 4.3. All 10 API endpoints tested successfully with 29/29 tests passing. The module includes slippage calculation, latency tracking, fill quality analysis, and liquidity impact assessment - all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/slippage/health - returns status healthy, version phase_4.3, and 4 components
GET /api/slippage/stats - returns execution statistics with optional symbol/exchange filters
POST /api/slippage/analyze - full execution analysis with mock data generation when expected_price=0
POST /api/slippage/analyze - with custom prices validates slippage direction correctly
POST /api/slippage/analyze - VWAP calculation from multiple fills working
POST /api/slippage/analyze - favorable slippage detection for BUY (lower executed = favorable)
POST /api/slippage/analyze - favorable slippage detection for SELL (higher executed = favorable)
POST /api/slippage/estimate - pre-execution slippage estimation with factors breakdown
POST /api/slippage/estimate - volatility and liquidity factors affect estimates correctly
POST /api/slippage/estimate - large order size adjustment working
POST /api/slippage/batch - batch execution analysis for multiple orders
POST /api/slippage/batch - respects limit of 20 orders
GET /api/slippage/history - execution history with filters (symbol, exchange, min_grade, limit)
GET /api/slippage/order/{order_id} - returns 404 for non-existent order
GET /api/slippage/order/{order_id} - retrieves order after analyze
GET /api/slippage/symbol/{symbol} - symbol-specific statistics
GET /api/slippage/exchange/{exchange} - exchange-specific statistics
GET /api/slippage/exchange-comparison - comparison across exchanges
Data persistence flow: analyze -> lookup -> verify working correctly
Symbol history includes newly analyzed orders
seed_data_creation: Test cases create temporary orders with TEST_ prefix during execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: PHASE 4.3 Slippage Engine is fully tested and working. All execution intelligence features (slippage calculation, latency tracking, fill quality analysis, liquidity impact assessment) are functional. Module integrates with MongoDB for storing execution snapshots. MOCKED: All market data and executions use mocked data generators when no real data is provided.
mocked_api_note: All market data and executions are MOCKED. The slippage engine generates mock execution data when expected_price is 0 or fills are empty.
